tweets.full_text:
Today the FBI and DOJ announced the arrests of Cornelius Shannon and Arturo Hernandez, both of whom were charged with violations of the TAKE IT DOWN Act. The TAKE IT DOWN Act prohibits nonconsensual publication of AI-generated digital forgeries (deepfake) pornography. Shannon and Hernandez allegedly posted thousands of images and videos that appeared to depict real people nude and/or engaging in sexual acts, and victims included actresses, singers, and political figures.

Learn more about the @NewYorkFBI investigation: https://t.co/HJit9Pyr2B

user.name: fai nur
user.description: ceo and cofounder @thestatusai. also yc w22, snap, and harvard law.

quoted_status.full_text:
Status has raised $17M in seed and Series A funding led by @AbstractVC, @generalcatalyst and @usv to let anyone step inside their favorite stories, become famous, and live a million different lives.

We quietly launched Status last year and grew to over 1 million users in 19 days - making us the fastest growing AI app since ChatGPT.

But we hit a (predictable) snag - the app was incredibly expensive to run. How do you serve millions of users without degrading the product with a cheap LLM? 

So the team locked in: we rebuilt the whole experience, and our technical bets paid off. Our users now spend 35 minutes on average to (90 minutes each day for power users!), and millions of characters and worlds have been created. All by our users.

The next frontier of entertainment is mobile-first and deeply personal. Traditional mobile games take years to build and rarely stick. TV shows are fleeting in the age of streaming. Status is different. It is not a game you finish, it is a world you can live in.

Status is a new category entirely: Immersive Social Entertainment, and we believe strongly that it is the next great entertainment paradigm. We’ve 10x’d to millions in annual revenue in Q1 2026, we're just getting started. 

On Status, you can be anyone.

tweets.full_text:
With a recent ATH of 1,469,241 minutes terminated, the next phase of Minutes Network rollout is approaching rapidly.

The Minutes Network Exchange will launch with:
• 100M+ concurrent session capability
• Sub-25ms call setup
• AI-backed routing and optimisation
• Instant settlement
• SMS integrity verification
• MinTest route scoring and testing

Voice, SMS, routing, verification, testing, and settlement operating inside one programmable telecom environment.

At the same time, Jingle deployment across Pakistan is moving toward large-scale rollout.

As Jingle-enabled endpoints expand across live traffic:
• routing efficiency improves
• more traffic terminates directly within the Minutes Network ecosystem
• network intelligence compounds across the platform

Deployment activity continues across live production infrastructure.

At I/O, we announced a big new export partner: Bolt by StackBlitz! ⚡️

@boltdotnew is an AI-powered builder that generates full-stack web apps directly in your browser. Now, you can take your Stitch screens from a visual concept to a fully coded application with a single click.

Here is how it works:

🔹 Select your screens in Stitch
🔹 Click export
🔹 Your screens are automatically transferred to Bolt, ready to be built into a working product

🛠️ (Note: Bolt will accept up to 5 screens at a time for Bolt Free users, and up to 20 screens for Paid users)

user.name: Ryan Hayes

quoted_status.full_text:
Today, we launch https://t.co/8BKwa4VmRQ @tycoonai: the world’s first operating system for one-person companies. Everyone gets an AI CEO + infinite AI employees(coding, marketing, ops etc.)

A year ago, I became the first human CEO replaced by an AI CEO named Astra.
Astra helped companies reach 100K+ users and $1M ARR in 30 days.

That experiment became Tycoon.

Today, Corporate America(e.g. Meta) is telling one story about AI:
Fewer people. Fewer jobs. Fewer humans needed.
Fuck that story.

I believe the opposite.

For the first time, one person can build with the operating power of an entire company.

One founder. One AI CEO. Infinite AI employees.

You text Astra your ideas, goals, tasks, and questions.
- She strategizes, assigns work to AI employees, reviews progress, and makes sure it gets done.
- She can manage up to 1,000 agents in parallel, 24/7, while you sleep.

Tycoon includes built-in AI employees for engineering, marketing, research, content, SEO, finance, legal, support, and video. Astra can also manage Claude Code and Hermes Agent.

The old company was built around headcount, managers, meetings, and layers.
The new company starts with one person and a dream.

Execution belongs to machines.
Vision belongs to humans.

That is what Tycoon is for.
Start your one person company today!
https://t.co/t4uSI2YD1b

tweets.full_text:
個人的には、こういう話題がもっと取り上げられてほしいと思っています。

​Google が、画像や動画が実写か AI 生成かを見分ける仕組み（SynthID やコンテンツ認証情報）を検索や Chrome などに順次導入すると発表しました。

​特に注目すべき点は、この技術の採用に OpenAI など他社も合意していることです。

​機能の進化だけでなく、企業間の垣根を越えて情報の透明性を担保する標準化が進んでいるという事実は、もっと広く知られてもいいニュースだと思いました！

#GoogleIO

tweets.full_text:
この記事を読んだとき、あれ？！なんで？！と思いました。先日発表された「Google検索における生成型AI機能向けにウェブサイトを最適化する」と真逆の事をなぜ短期間に言うの？と思えたんです。ガイド公開からたった4日で、です。
平たく言うと、ガイドは「SEOは大事、小細工するな」と言ったように受け止めました。なのにこの記事は「青いリンクはおまけになる」と。じゃあちゃんと記事書いても意味ないじゃん、って一瞬思ったんです。

でもこの2つ、別々に読むものじゃないと思ったんです。
公式ガイドは「中身を良くしろ小細工はするな」と言っています。I/Oは「リンクはおまけになる」と言っています。一見、真逆です。
でもこれって並べて読むと、矛盾していませんでした。

Googleは良質なコンテンツの供給は欲しい。でもサイトへのトラフィックは前ほど返さない。供給は求める、対価は減らす。それで一貫しています。
"SEOは有効"も"リンクは終わり"も、同じ前提から出てる話ではないでしょうか？

【緊急ゲリラ開催！】
Gemini Omniに無茶振りジェネレーターAIコンテスト⚡️

Gemini Omniの画像認識能力＆爆速アイデア出しを使って
“AIが考えた無茶振り”を本気で作品化してみよう

🎁賞品🎁
グランプリ1名　アマギフ5,000円
準グランプリ2名　2,000円

📅締切📅
本日〜5/22 19:00

🗓️結果発表🗓️
5/25 19:00

🌷作成の仕方🌷
①Gemini Omniで「絶対にありえない組み合わせの面白い画像のテーマを1つ出して」と質問する
②Omniが出したお題を元に画像を生成

✅応募方法✅
・このアカウント(@Contest_AI )をフォロー
・このポストにリプライ or 引用RTで #Omniに無茶振り をつけて作品を投稿

「何作ればいいかわからない」をAIに丸投げできる、
初心者でも参加しやすいゲリラ企画です

意味不明なお題ほど大歓迎🔥
皆様のカオス作品お待ちしております‼️
